title: HTML & CSS Fundamentals
description: Build the foundation of every website. Learn HTML structure and CSS styling from scratch.
longDescription: HTML and CSS are the building blocks of the web. Every website you've ever visited was built with these two languages. In this course you'll go from zero to building beautiful, structured web pages. Every lesson ends with something you can see and be proud of.
whatYouLearn: Structure web pages with semantic HTML5
Style elements with CSS properties and selectors
Build responsive layouts with Flexbox and Grid
Create forms and interactive UI elements

lessons.title: What is HTML?
lessons.description: Discover what HTML is and why it powers every website. We'll write our very first HTML document together.

lessons.title: HTML Tags & Elements
lessons.description: Learn about opening and closing tags, nested elements, and the most common HTML tags.

lessons.title: Headings, Paragraphs & Text
lessons.description: Master text formatting in HTML — headings, paragraphs, bold, italic, and content hierarchy.

lessons.title: Links & Navigation
lessons.description: Build connections between pages with anchor tags. Learn relative vs absolute paths and nav menus.

lessons.title: Images & Media
lessons.description: Add images and figures to your pages. Best practices for web performance and accessibility.

lessons.title: Lists & Tables
lessons.description: Organise information with ordered and unordered lists. Create data tables with proper headers.

lessons.title: Forms & User Input
lessons.description: Build interactive forms with text inputs, dropdowns, checkboxes, and submit buttons.

lessons.title: Introduction to CSS
lessons.description: Connect CSS to HTML and start applying styles. Learn selectors, properties, values, and the cascade.

lessons.title: Colors, Fonts & Text
lessons.description: Make your pages beautiful with color, Google Fonts, font sizing, line height, and text alignment.

lessons.title: The Box Model
lessons.description: Every element is a box — margin, border, padding, content. This unlocks CSS layout.

lessons.title: Flexbox Layout
lessons.description: Master Flexbox to create one-dimensional layouts with ease. Align, justify, and distribute elements.

lessons.title: Responsive Design
lessons.description: Make your sites look great on every screen using media queries and responsive techniques.
